seoTitle: Newport News Public Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Newport News Public Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 25 first day, Jun 9 last student day, holidays, breaks, exam dates, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Newport News Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 25, 2025. Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, Spring Break runs April 6-10, and the last student day is June 9, 2026. The calendar also lists teacher planning days, regional professional development, exam dates, early dismissals, and high school graduations.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Newport News Public Schools start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: All students report on Monday, August 25, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is NNPS Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Newport News in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last student day is Tuesday, June 9, 2026. The last teacher day is June 10.

calendarFaqs.q: Does the NNPS 2025-2026 calendar include high school exams?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The calendar lists January 21-23 and June 5, 8, and 9 as exam dates.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break is the first week of April for Peninsula school divisions.

yearNumbers.label: Last Student Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last student day is June 9, 2026.
